description: Add a work log entry to the request titled 'VPN disconnects intermittently for remote user'. Record the technician as 'administrator', the execution date as today, and the time spent as 2 hours 30 minutes. For the description, enter: "Diagnosed VPN disconnection issue. Steps taken: (1) Verified VPN client version and updated from v4.1 to v4.3. (2) Checked split-tunnel configuration on firewall - found MTU mismatch causing packet fragmentation. (3) Adjusted MTU from 1500 to 1400 on client profile. (4) Tested connection stability over 30-minute session - no drops observed. Root cause: MTU mismatch between client and concentrator after recent firewall firmware upgrade."

metadata.request_subject: VPN disconnects intermittently for remote user
